name: Chocoholic Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small saucepan, melt butter; remove from heat.
3. Stir in baking chocolate. Cool completely.
4. In a small mixing bowl, beat eggs and vanilla.
5. Gradually add sugar, beating until pale yellow.
6. Blend in the chocolate mixture.
7. Gradually add flour and salt.
8. Stir in nuts.
9. Spread batter in a greased 8 inch square pan.
10. Bake for 30 minutes or until done.
11. Cool completely in the pan.
12. Cut into 2-inch squares.
13. Makes 16 brownies.
